architecture.summary: Two isolated fixes: server-side Prisma query scoping in vskill-platform Next.js API route, client-side param addition in vskill ESM CLI. No architectural changes.

integrations.summary: vskill CLI calls vskill-platform blocklist check API. Fix adds repoUrl query param to existing HTTP call. No new integrations.

ui-ux.summary: CLI interactive prompt restoration: promptChoice for Project vs Global scope. Warning message accuracy fix for rejection display.

performance.summary: N/A - Bug fixes only. Scoped query uses existing compound index, no perf regression.

security.summary: Fix improves security posture: scoping rejection queries by repoUrl prevents cross-author information leakage where one authors rejection status falsely taints another.

edge-cases.summary: Edge cases: repoUrl not provided (backward compat, fall back to name-only), --global flag skips scope prompt, non-TTY skips prompt, API unreachable graceful degradation already handled.
